---
output: github_document
---

Graphics made from BN output for the ENCORE project.

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Code Files

`_RUNME.R`, Loads packages and runs all figure generation scripts

`load_data.R` - Load datafile and pivot longer

`fct_parse_nodes.R` - Parse node names into categorical variables

`format_data.R` - Join lookups of pretty names and prepare for plotting

`merge_intervals.R` - Merge from 12 to 6 RQ intervals

`themes.R` - Common colour, axis scales and theming for graphs

`make_fig5.R`, Generate individual stressor risk quotient probability distributions by RBD

`make_fig6.R`, Generate grouped stressor comparison visualisations

`make_fig7.R`, Generate multiple risk metrics comparison charts

# Figure 5 (All RBDs)

![Figure 5a](images/fig5_beescaut-rw.png)

![Figure 5b](images/fig5_bemaas-vl.png)

![Figure 5c](images/fig5_bemeuse-rw.png)

![Figure 5d](images/fig5_berhin-rw.png)

![Figure 5e](images/fig5_beschelde-vl.png)

# Figure 6

![Figure 6](images/fig6_grouped_stressors.png)

# Figure 7 (All RBDs)

![Figure 7a](images/fig7_beescaut-rw.png)

![Figure 7b](images/fig7_bemaas-vl.png)

![Figure 7c](images/fig7_bemeuse-rw.png)

![Figure 7d](images/fig7_berhin-rw.png)

![Figure 7e](images/fig7_beschelde-vl.png)
